text: The Queensland Government launched its digital identity framework in 2021 (https://www.qld.gov.au/digital-identity).

gold.claim: The Queensland Government launched its digital identity framework in 2021

text: Open data portals improved service delivery by 34 per cent according to a 2022 departmental review (Smith, 2022).

gold.claim: Open data portals improved service delivery by 34 per cent according to a 2022 departmental review

text: The policy reform reduced processing time by 18 per cent.

gold.claim: The policy reform reduced processing time by 18 per cent.

text: Public sector AI adoption reached $2 billion in annual expenditure by 2023.

gold.claim: Public sector AI adoption reached $2 billion in annual expenditure by 2023.

text: The framework was established under section 45 of the Public Sector Act.

gold.claim: The framework was established under section 45 of the Public Sector Act.

text: A 2019 review found that algorithm-assisted decisions reduced appeal rates.

gold.claim: A 2019 review found that algorithm-assisted decisions reduced appeal rates.

text: Government cloud spending exceeded $4 billion in the 2022 financial year [CITE NEEDED].

gold.claim: Government cloud spending exceeded $4 billion in the 2022 financial year [CITE NEEDED].

text: This document sets out the methodology for evaluating policy outcomes. It does not make any quantitative claims.

Consultation rates fell 22 per cent.
Source: https://www.abs.gov.au/consultation-survey-2023

gold.claim: Consultation rates fell 22 per cent.

text:
The pilot programme enrolled 14,000 participants by 2020.
This was below the 20,000 target.
See https://www.dta.gov.au/pilot-report for details.

gold.claim: The pilot programme enrolled 14,000 participants by 2020.

text: Digital transformation programmes contributed an estimated $1.2 billion in productivity gains last year [CITE NEEDED].

gold.claim: Digital transformation programmes contributed an estimated $1.2 billion in productivity gains last year [CITE NEEDED].

text: The governance board meets quarterly to review compliance outcomes.
According to the national audit, only 41 per cent of agencies met baseline data quality standards (ANAO, 2023).

gold.claim: According to the national audit, only 41 per cent of agencies met baseline data quality standards

text: Emissions from the public fleet fell 9 per cent between 2018 and 2022.

gold.claim: Emissions from the public fleet fell 9 per cent between 2018 and 2022.

text: The Act 2017 requires agencies to publish a data inventory within 60 days of policy commencement.

gold.claim: The Act 2017 requires agencies to publish a data inventory within 60 days of policy commencement.

gold.claim: A survey conducted in 2021 showed that 67 per cent of public servants had received no AI ethics training

text: This section summarises the key findings from the literature review.
Automated decision systems were estimated to process 3 million applications per year by 2025 [CITE NEEDED].

gold.claim: Automated decision systems were estimated to process 3 million applications per year by 2025 [CITE NEEDED].

text: Data matching programmes recovered $780 million in fraud and overpayments in 2020.

text: All agencies must comply with section 23 of the Privacy Act before sharing personal information.

gold.claim: All agencies must comply with section 23 of the Privacy Act before sharing personal information.

text: Research conducted in 2023 shows that citizen trust in automated decisions declined significantly without explanation requirements.

gold.claim: Research conducted in 2023 shows that citizen trust in automated decisions declined significantly without explanation requirements.

text: The annual report documents operational achievements and expenditure for the preceding financial year.

Implementation costs were projected at $450 million over four years according to Treasury modelling.

gold.claim: Implementation costs were projected at $450 million over four years according to Treasury modelling.

text: The 2020 digital skills census found that 28 per cent of public servants lacked foundational data literacy.

text:
Regulatory compliance rates improved markedly following training.
A broader cultural shift was also evident.
The OECD reported these outcomes in 2022.
Procurement spend on AI tools grew from $200 million in 2019 to over $800 million in 2023 [CITE NEEDED].

gold.claim: Procurement spend on AI tools grew from $200 million in 2019 to over $800 million in 2023 [CITE NEEDED].

text: The Productivity Commission estimated that regulatory burden costs small businesses $67 billion per year (Productivity Commission, 2021).

text: According to the independent review, 52 per cent of legacy systems have not been assessed for AI readiness.

gold.claim: According to the independent review, 52 per cent of legacy systems have not been assessed for AI readiness.

text: The implementation team completed its transition planning in 2022 without significant delay.

gold.claim: The implementation team completed its transition planning in 2022 without significant delay.

text:
Workforce reductions averaged 12 per cent across the four affected agencies.
A voluntary separation scheme was offered.
Statistics are drawn from internal workforce reports dated June 2023.

text: The project scope, methodology, and governance structure are described in the following sections.
